title: MythicAddons
description: Adds multiple Vanilla+ features, to help with more technical issues
body:
This mod is a fabric-carpet extension, meaning that you need `fabric-carpet` installed. 

This mod uses carpet’s modular system to add in multiple (carpet-extra) style tweaks to the game.

Such tweaks include 
 - emptyshulkerCeption — which lets you have empty shulker boxes inside of each other, for ease of transporting
- stackableBows — this was created as it is suuuper tedious to craft dispensers, so using the same technique carpet uses, bows will stack up to 64 when thrown onto the ground
- oldFlintAndSteel — re-adds the behavior where flint & steel will update observers
- commandUnicorn — adds a no-attack cool down in place of your precious helmet (dont worry, you still get to keep it)
- stackableShulkerBoxesInPlayerInventories — helps stackable shulker boxes not be such a pain
- editableSigns

And more!
